title: Subitem status change
excerpt: I have a board where individual subitems may need to be marked as ‘complete’ or ‘not required’. If either of those things happen, I need the subitem to be moved to another group on the board. Currently I can only get the…

posts.author: jade.woodward (Jade)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board where individual subitems may need to be marked as ‘complete’ or ‘not required’. If either of those things happen, I need the subitem to be moved to another group on the board. Currently I can only get the whole item to move based on the subitem status, but I need only that 1 subitem to move.
I want the subitem to stay linked to the main item however, so envisage the automation duplicating the item, then moving only the relevant sub item to the required group

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jade.woodward ,

We recently launched “Automate Subitems” app on marketlplace, which has an automation recipe - When {subitem status} changes to {something}, copy it to {item}. I think this will perfecly solve you use case. Get the app from here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Thanks

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
